goal: TH poster date/orientation/reading drift to right edge on iPhone despite Chrome rendering centred
done: Hypothesis: iOS Safari canvas ctx.textAlign='center' mis-centres Thai (Latin OK -> only Thai date/orientation/reading drift right). Fix: explicit centring — measure run width, draw left-aligned at x - w/2 — in drawTrackingText Thai branch (date+orientation, all posters) and both drawTagline blocks (daily + question/full). Identical in Chrome (no regression). Version bumped to share.js?v=20260620i so it delivers past the edge cache.
root_cause: textAlign='center' unreliable for Thai on iOS Safari canvas.
fix: manual measure + left-align centring for Thai text.
verified: Chrome render still centred (no regression); iOS to be confirmed by founder
notes: User to re-test on iPhone. If still off: check ctx.direction or per-glyph Thai layout.

goal: VeilaTarot-style scattered card-selection board for Daily/Ask/Celtic
done: setupBoard() gains a scatter mode: places face-down slots in a JITTERED GRID (8 cols mobile / 13 desktop, per-card random offset + ±11° tilt, %-based, re-randomised on shuffle) instead of the rigid grid. Wired into all 3 boards — Ask-a-Question + Daily = 30 cards, Celtic/Full = 78. Drops the grid-modifier class so id-rules don't fight it; scatter .card-slot uses !important sizing to beat per-board id rules; smooth left/top transition on re-scatter + scatterCardIn fade-in. Selection contract unchanged. Verified: question render + full(78) render + tap-3 interaction (counter 3/3, Continue enables, 30 slots, card-board--scatter applied).
notes: Daily headless render kept timing out (slow page) — same code path, device-QA it. NEXT: result-page flip crossfade (VeilaTarot 2-layer .face-back/.face-front opacity .6s).
